시편 118:1.content: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

시편 118:2.content: Let Israel now say that his loving kindness endures forever.

시편 118:3.content: Let the house of Aaron now say that his loving kindness endures forever.

시편 118:4.content: Now let those who fear Yahweh say that his loving kindness endures forever.

시편 118:5.content: Out of my distress, I called on Yah. Yah answered me with freedom.

시편 118:6.content: Yahweh is on my side. I will not be afraid. What can man do to me?

시편 118:7.content: Yahweh is on my side among those who help me. Therefore I will look in triumph at those who hate me.

시편 118:8.content: It is better to take refuge in Yahweh, than to put confidence in man.

시편 118:9.content: It is better to take refuge in Yahweh, than to put confidence in princes.

시편 118:10.content: All the nations surrounded me, but in Yahweh’s name, I cut them off.

시편 118:11.content: They surrounded me, yes, they surrounded me. In Yahweh’s name I indeed cut them off.

시편 118:12.content: They surrounded me like bees. They are quenched like the burning thorns. In Yahweh’s name I cut them off.

시편 118:13.content: You pushed me back hard, to make me fall, but Yahweh helped me.

시편 118:14.content: Yah is my strength and song. He has become my salvation.

시편 118:15.content: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tents of the righteous. “The right hand of Yahweh does valiantly.

시편 118:16.content: The right hand of Yahweh is exalted! The right hand of Yahweh does valiantly!”

시편 118:17.content: I will not die, but live, and declare Yah’s works.

시편 118:18.content: Yah has punished me severely, but he has not given me over to death.

시편 118:19.content: Open to me the gates of righteousness. I will enter into them. I will give thanks to Yah.

시편 118:20.content: This is the gate of Yahweh; the righteous will enter into it.

시편 118:21.content: I will give thanks to you, for you have answered me, and have become my salvation.

시편 118:22.content: The stone which the builders rejected has become the cornerstone.

시편 118:23.content: This is Yahweh’s doing. It is marvelous in our eyes.

시편 118:24.content: This is the day that Yahweh has made. We will rejoice and be glad in it!

시편 118:25.content: Save us now, we beg you, Yahweh! Yahweh, we beg you, send prosperity now.

시편 118:26.content: Blessed is he who comes in Yahweh’s name! We have blessed you out of Yahweh’s house.

시편 118:27.content: Yahweh is God, and he has given us light. Bind the sacrifice with cords, even to the horns of the altar.

시편 118:28.content: You are my God, and I will give thanks to you. You are my God, I will exalt you.

시편 118:29.content: Oh give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.
